Pricing
LoginGet a demoStart for free

Already a Honeycomb customer?

Login

Unlimited exploration. Unrivaled value.

The only observability platform you need at a predictable price that doesn’t penalize you for your curiosity.

Best for testing and individual projects

Free

Event Volume: Up to 20M per month

Start for free

Our introductory plan, free forever.

Includes:

  • 2 Triggers
  • Distributed Tracing
  • BubbleUp
  • OpenTelemetry Support
  • Team Query History
  • Query Result Permalinks
  • Honeycomb Metrics
Best for teams with a production application

Pro

Event Volume: Up to 1.5B per month

Start for free

Starting at $130 per month

Includes:

  • All features from the Free Plan
  • 100 Triggers
  • 2 Service Level Objectives (SLOs)
  • Single-Sign On (SSO)
  • Honeycomb Support
  • Monthly or Annual Subscription
Best for multi-team and large-scale applications

Enterprise

Event Volume: Variable

Request a trial

Custom plans to fit your needs

Includes:

  • All features from the Pro Plan
  • Starts with 300 Triggers
  • Starts with 100 SLOs
  • Service Map
  • Enterprise Support for Refinery
  • Enterprise-Grade Support + Onboarding
  • Query Data API
  • AWS PrivateLink
  • SLO Reporting API
  • Support for Honeycomb Private Cloud

Take control of your observability budget

Honeycomb is the observability platform of choice for engineering teams who care about customer experience–and also managing their budget. Our pricing model puts you in control and scales predictably as the complexity of your application grows.

Collect all your telemetry

Optimize your telemetry data at an affordable rate.

  • Starting at $0.10 / GB
  • OpenTelemetry processing and fleet management
  • Query access with Honeycomb
Learn More

Ingest real-time events

Send high-signal, context-rich telemetry with unlimited custom fields.

  • Free: Up to 20M events and 100M time series data points
  • Pro: Starting at $130 / 100M events (up to 1.5B) and 500M time series data points (up to 7.5B)
  • Enterprise: Volume discounts available
Learn more

Add-ons

Add powerful capabilities to your enterprise plan tailored to your team's needs.

  • Frontend performance analysis
  • Enterprise-grade alerting
  • Installation and enablement services
Learn More

Your price

Clear and predictable pricing that scales with your business to deliver everything you need.

  • Unlimited seats
  • Unlimited querying
  • Unlimited scale

Want a personalized quote?

Talk to our team to get a tailored Enterprise quote based on precisely what you need.

GET YOUR QUOTE

Compare our plans
